name: Ace Loans Pawn Shop (Platte ave.)
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Colorado Springs specializing in electronics, tools, jewelry, and musical instruments with 40+ years of operation.
description_long:
Ace Loans Pawnshop East is a established pawn shop located at 2339 Platte Place in Colorado Springs, Colorado. The business has operated as a family-owned enterprise for over 40 years, building longevity in the local community and pawn lending market. According to their Facebook presence, they maintain strong community engagement through events and local partnerships.

The shop specializes in collateral-based lending and the buying/selling of used merchandise across multiple categories. Their inventory focuses on newer electronics, power tools, jewelry, and musical instruments. They advertise daily new inventory arrivals, suggesting active acquisition and turnover. The business operates as a traditional pawn shop model where customers can either sell items or use them as collateral for loans.

The business distinguishes itself through emphasis on staff expertise and customer service. Their Facebook describes having "Friendly and Knowledgeable staff," and they actively engage the community through hosting vendor events and live music programming. The 96% recommendation rate from 21 Facebook reviews suggests positive customer satisfaction, though the review sample size is modest. They maintain accessible pricing in the moderate ($$) range.

Like all pawn shops, Ace Loans operates within a model that serves customers with immediate liquidity needs but involves asset forfeiture risk. The moderate price range and focus on consumer goods suggests lending against tangible personal property rather than high-value items. Operating hours appear limited (currently closed status noted), which may impact accessibility for some customers. The company's primary value proposition is quick cash access without credit checks, typical of the pawn industry.
address: 2339 E Platte Pl, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

company_info.headquarters: 2339 E Platte Pl, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

pros: 40+ years of family business ownership and community presence
96% customer recommendation rate on Facebook (21 reviews)
Daily new inventory arrivals across multiple product categories
Specializes in newer electronics, tools, jewelry, and musical instruments
Friendly and knowledgeable staff according to customer feedback
Active community engagement through events and vendor partnerships
No credit check required for collateral-based loans
cons: Limited sample size for reviews (only 21 Facebook reviews)
Operating hours appear restricted, with current closed status noted
Pawn loans involve risk of losing collateral if unable to repay
Limited transparency on specific loan terms, interest rates, and repayment periods on website
Typical pawn shop model means high effective interest rates on short-term loans
best_for: Customers needing quick cash against personal items (electronics, instruments, jewelry, tools)
People with poor credit or no credit history seeking collateral-based lending
Those with immediate liquidity needs and items of resale value
diagnosis: Ace Loans is best for customers needing immediate cash against personal property without credit checks, particularly those with electronics, tools, jewelry, or instruments to use as collateral. The main caveat is typical pawn shop risk: inability to repay results in loss of collateral, and effective interest rates are generally higher than traditional personal loans.
services: Pawn loans against jewelry, electronics, tools, and musical instruments
Purchase and sale of used electronics
Purchase and sale of used power tools
Musical instrument sales and pawn services
Community event hosting and vendor coordination

places_enrichment.formatted_address: 2339 E Platte Pl, Colorado Springs, CO 80909, USA
places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 2339 E Platte Pl, Colorado Springs, CO 80909-6039, USA

reviews.author: Jay Mes
reviews.text: The people who work here are really cool. Every time I needed some cash to cover a bill or something these guys always came thru for me and gave me a good deal for my item. I try a support this business with my business as much as I can. Got scooter and some other stuff for a great price.

reviews.author: Ace south
reviews.text: Great shopping experience and lots to look at. A fun shop!

reviews.author: David Hermanson
reviews.text: I walked into the establishment, it smelled it was crowded , and the person who was running it was taking his time with a person trying to sell or pawn stuff. Person asked me what I wanted I told him then he said oh I have some of those, and turned to help the two homeless people that were still pulling stuff out of her bag. Hope there sales were worth it because you have lost my business.

reviews.author: Nomster
reviews.text: Ace Pawn Shop is a hidden jewel here in our own back yard. To elaborate on the point it has a great variety of electronics to choose from as well as many other items. The staff is always friendly and helpful. It's nice to know that I can come here and find what I need without having to pay a price just to come in like the flee market. I will be coming back to do business with them again soon!

reviews.author: Andre Eddens
reviews.text: I have been going to this pawn shop since I was a kid. Always have been very good to my family and I. The very fist bike I bought with my own money was there. And now they are one huge contribution to the art community and the knobhill area! Thank you Nathan for all your hard work helping our community in more ways than one!
